name: alphax
description: alphaX gives Codex a source-identified entrypoint and current Alpha Partner source skills.

interface.longDescription: alphaX is a thin Codex entrypoint generated from Alpha Partner Source. It resolves accepted or candidate Source explicitly, records Source identity, and exposes current problem decomposition, Double Diamond research, Insight Catcher, and formal-development skills without becoming a runtime or project store.
defaultPrompt: Use alphax:insight-catcher to evaluate this creative input.
Use alphax:formal-development for this PRD or formal-development review.
